generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M for PM synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current I_M measured by current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueMeasuredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque from dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, SimulationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of friction models using MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance DataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data linking via Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLinkingInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization dashboard for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model-based control parameter adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction dynamics insights for control parameter adjustment"
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction dynamics insights for control parameter adjustment"
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction dynamics insights for control parameter adjustment"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improved motion accuracy through model-based adjustments"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for first axis"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results from friction models"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming insights"
]

instance DataLinkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data linking insights via AAS"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization insights for monitoring"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for precise axis movement"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor actuated via input current I_M"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification and visualization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating physical robot components, sensors, engineering models, simulation models, and processing components linked via AAS and MQTT for real-time data flow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated); continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data (Simulink) against measured data; manufacturer-provided dynamics model parameters; error analysis of friction models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML standards for modeling; Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for data linking and asset description."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety cell restricts robot movement range to [−90°, 90°]; no details on DT cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols."
]
